name: Tideseal Stone
title: Tideseal Stone
desc: "The night sky has been devoured by deathly silence. We knead blood and bone for fuel, and so proclaim: The Long Night flows dark and deep. With these lanterns we wield, no specter shall stir from their sleep. By the lunar spirits, this pact is sealed."

skills.desc:
When Action Phase begins: Attach Cost Increase and Untunable to 1 random card in the opponent's Hand.
Usage(s): 2
